title: Record soft30 async18 and hard60 densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft30 Async18 Hard60 Contract

## Soft 30
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.30 with quality bias floor 0.28 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 18
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.18 so reclaim starts earlier

## Hard 60
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.60 and absolute trigger to 45k so long sessions reclaim earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
